evals.name: photo-with-caption-handler
evals.prompt: Telegram bot handler in ktgbotapi: when user sends a photo with a caption, reply with bold-formatted message echoing the caption, and attach an inline keyboard with two buttons — 'Approve' and 'Reject', each carrying the original message id as callback data. Show the handler code using current ktgbotapi APIs.
evals.expected_output: BehaviourBuilder usage (onPhoto or onContentMessage with PhotoContent), reply with MarkdownV2/HTML/parseMode, InlineKeyboardMarkup with CallbackDataInlineKeyboardButton including message id, ktgbotapi 33.x imports.
assertions: Replies with bold formatted text (MarkdownV2/HTML parseMode or sendTextMessage with formatting)
Inline keyboard built with inlineKeyboard {} DSL or InlineKeyboardMarkup
Original message id propagated into callback data

evals.name: fsm-collect-user-info
evals.prompt: Build a 4-step FSM dialog with ktgbotapi: ask name, ask phone, ask address, show summary, ask confirm yes/no. On yes, save and send 'Done'. On no, restart from name. Show sealed State classes, strictlyOn handlers per state, and how the dialog kicks off on /start.
evals.expected_output: Sealed State subclasses for each step, strictlyOn<State> handlers, state transitions via context.next(...) or similar, dialog initiation from /start command.
assertions: Sealed State class with 4+ subclasses for dialog steps
State transitions return next state (e.g. State.CollectPhone)
Confirm step branches to save or restart based on user response
Dialog initiation from /start command (onCommand or onStart)
